title: Self-Search RL: A Full-Sim Framework for Search-Driven Agentic Tasks

defines.name: Self-Search RL (SSRL)
defines.definition: A full-simulation reinforcement learning framework that improves an LLM's ability to internally generate search queries and information using format-based and rule-based rewards.

problem: Training search-driven agents with real search engines is expensive and slow, and existing methods depend heavily on external tool interactions during reinforcement learning.
